title: codereview-pass1: sender_addr vs parsed Target in DAO event
description: In lichen-node/src/node.rs:323 sender_addr from IPv6 SRC used for DaoReceived.target while extract_edge in lichen-rpl/src/routing.rs:382 parses RPL_TARGET option. Fix by making process_dao return the parsed target. P2 correctness. part-of:project-LICHEN-2j8o
close_reason: fixed sender_addr vs parsed Target in DAO by updating process_dao return; exact changes; verified builds/lints
